inputs.label: Room Length (m)
inputs.businessContext: Physical dimension of the room. Standard construction practice (ISO 1000).

inputs.label: Room Width (m)
inputs.businessContext: Physical dimension of the room. Standard construction practice (ISO 1000).

inputs.label: Flooring Type
inputs.businessContext: Material selection affects cost and waste factor. Industry standards (ASTM F1869 for moisture, etc.).

inputs.label: Waste Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Typical waste factor for flooring installation: 5-15% depending on pattern and room shape. Lean construction principles recommend minimizing waste.

inputs.label: Material Cost per m² (currency)
inputs.businessContext: Market price for selected flooring type. Sourced from local suppliers or RSMeans cost data.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per m² (currency)
inputs.businessContext: Installation labor rate. Varies by region and complexity. Industry benchmarks from BLS or RSMeans.

inputs.label: Additional Costs (currency)
inputs.businessContext: Miscellaneous costs: underlayment, adhesive, removal of old flooring, etc.

inputs.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment. Common in project management (PMBOK).

thresholds.wasteFactor > 15: High waste factor; consider optimizing layout or ordering extra material.
thresholds.materialCostPerM2 > 100: Material cost is high; consider alternative flooring types.
thresholds.laborCostPerM2 > 80: Labor cost is high; consider DIY or negotiate rates.

hiddenLossDrivers: wasteFactor > 15 ? 'High waste factor increases material cost' : ''
suggestedActions: wasteFactor > 15 ? 'Optimize layout to reduce waste; consider ordering extra material only if necessary.' : ''
materialCostPerM2 > 100 ? 'Compare prices from multiple suppliers or consider alternative flooring.' : ''
laborCostPerM2 > 80 ? 'Get multiple quotes from contractors or consider DIY installation.' : ''
